name: Ecosystem replacement bootstrap for June 3, 2026
summary: Bootstrap bundle establishing the first public baseline candidate for the ecosystem replacement track.

scope.question: What is the current human-relevant evidence landscape for Ecosystem Replacement, and what belongs in the first public baseline?

proposed_changes.summary: Add killifish young-microbiota lifespan source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supplies the vertebrate lifespan anchor for ecosystem replacement.

proposed_changes.summary: Add progeroid mouse FMT healthspan and lifespan source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supplies mammalian accelerated-aging healthspan and lifespan support.

proposed_changes.summary: Add young-aged mouse FMT gut, eye, and brain source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supports aged-animal inflammatory and barrier readouts after microbiota exchange.

proposed_changes.summary: Add old mouse FMT frailty gut-muscle source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supports the aged-animal frailty and gut-muscle-axis component of the baseline.

proposed_changes.summary: Add young-trained donor FMT cognition source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source adds recent aged-mouse gut-brain-axis and donor-selection evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add young-to-old mouse FMT metabolic health source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This recent source supports aged-animal frailty, grip-strength, body-composition, metabolomic, and neuroinflammatory readouts.

proposed_changes.summary: Add lean-donor FMT metabolic syndrome source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supplies the narrow human biomarker proof-of-concept used for the staged stage assignment.

proposed_changes.summary: Add older-adult CDI FMT source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supplies older-adult safety and disease-context boundary evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add FMT donor strain engraftment meta-analysis source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supports human engraftment plausibility and implementation blockers.

proposed_changes.summary: Add recruiting oral FMT aging trial registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This registry is direct older-adult aging trial-watch context with no posted results.

proposed_changes.summary: Add ARMOR young-donor FMT aging registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This registry confirms active-not-recruiting direct older-adult aging trial status and no posted results.

proposed_changes.summary: Add ARMOR resilient-aging trial protocol source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This protocol supplies direct human aging-focused FMT trial design and endpoint context.

proposed_changes.summary: Normalize fecal microbiota transplantation for ecosystem replacement.
proposed_changes.rationale: The track needs a public intervention record that groups FMT evidence while preserving aging-specific and approved-use boundaries.

proposed_changes.summary: Add killifish young-donor microbiota lifespan study.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study anchors the vertebrate lifespan evidence for the staged outlook.

proposed_changes.summary: Add progeroid mouse FMT healthspan and lifespan study.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study adds mammalian lifespan and healthspan support with progeroid-model caveats.

proposed_changes.summary: Add young-aged mouse FMT gut, eye, and brain study.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study supports causality between aged microbiota and inflammatory tissue aging readouts.

proposed_changes.summary: Add old mouse FMT frailty gut-muscle study.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study supplies frailty and gut-muscle-axis animal support.

proposed_changes.summary: Add young-trained donor FMT cognition study.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study supplies recent gut-brain-axis and donor-selection animal support.

proposed_changes.summary: Add young-to-old mouse FMT metabolic frailty study.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study supplies recent aged-mouse frailty, grip-strength, body-composition, metabolomic, and neuroinflammatory evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add lean-donor FMT metabolic syndrome study.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study supplies the human biomarker anchor while preserving disease-context boundaries.

proposed_changes.summary: Add older-adult CDI FMT case review study.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study provides older-adult safety and disease-context evidence without upgrading aging efficacy.

proposed_changes.summary: Add FMT donor strain engraftment meta-analysis study.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study supports human engraftment plausibility and implementation limitations.

proposed_changes.summary: Add recruiting oral FMT aging frailty trial study.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study supplies direct older-adult aging trial-watch context with no posted results.

proposed_changes.summary: Add ARMOR young-donor FMT resilient-aging trial study.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study supplies the direct young-active-donor older-adult trial protocol context.

proposed_changes.summary: Add killifish lifespan finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding captures the vertebrate lifespan signal and its translation caveats.

proposed_changes.summary: Add progeroid mouse healthspan and lifespan finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding captures mammalian lifespan support with accelerated-aging boundaries.

proposed_changes.summary: Add aged-mouse gut, eye, and brain inflammatory finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding supports the tissue-inflammation side of the animal baseline.

proposed_changes.summary: Add old-mouse frailty gut-muscle finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding supplies functional frailty and mechanism support in old mice.

proposed_changes.summary: Add young-trained donor FMT cognition finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding captures recent gut-brain-axis animal evidence and donor-selection caveats.

proposed_changes.summary: Add young-to-old mouse metabolic frailty finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding captures recent aged-mouse functional and metabolic evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add lean-donor FMT human biomarker finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding is the narrow human biomarker anchor for the staged outlook.

proposed_changes.summary: Add older-adult CDI FMT safety boundary finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding prevents older-adult disease-treatment evidence from being interpreted as aging efficacy.

proposed_changes.summary: Add cross-disease human FMT engraftment finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding supports mechanistic plausibility and implementation blockers around donor strain engraftment.

proposed_changes.summary: Add no-results context for recruiting oral FMT aging trial.
proposed_changes.rationale: The trial is direct aging-relevant activity but should not be treated as efficacy evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add no-results context for ARMOR young-donor FMT protocol.
proposed_changes.rationale: The protocol is direct older-adult trial activity but no efficacy results are available.

proposed_changes.summary: Create first public ecosystem replacement track outlook.
proposed_changes.rationale: The staged support map justifies a low-confidence human_biomarker_signal baseline with explicit animal-led and no-results human-aging-trial boundaries.

proposed_outlook_implications.note: Publishing this bundle would establish the first public ecosystem replacement baseline at low-confidence human_biomarker_signal, with direct aging benefit still animal-led and human aging trials still no-results.

next_actions: Publication complete. Review downstream pages if this change affects shared surfaces.
